name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Initialize Codex projects, refresh private project context from chat history, search and review Codex chats across projects, and manage sessions, decisions, memos, freshness, and distillation.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize projects, write private state, and reuse durable context
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for project initialization through .tkn/codex-context.yaml, versioned private context under ~/.tkn/codex-context, project-scoped refresh from Codex chat history, working dashboards, sessions, decisions, memos, cross-project chat search and review, distillation, and freshness audits.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository in the private Codex context registry
Refresh this project's session notes, decisions, and working context from Codex chat history
Resume an existing project session note
